name: bender-ui
description: Real-time viewer for ai-bender sessions. Reads .bender/sessions/<id>/ and streams events via SSE.

scripts.build:embed: bun build src/client/main.tsx --outfile ../internal/server/assets/client.js --target browser --minify && cp src/client/index.html ../internal/server/assets/index.html && cp src/client/styles.css ../internal/server/assets/styles.css
